description: RegCheck is a vehicle registration lookup service operated by Infinite Loop Development Ltd that returns vehicle details from number plates across the UK and many other countries. It also offers country-specific data such as MOT history and related vehicle metadata.
summary: regcheck.org.uk exposes two developer-facing HTTP APIs for vehicle registration lookups: a SOAP/ASMX API and a REST/JSON wrapper; the catalogued OpenAPI spec points at the REST API.
